steps.title: Use the collection detail
steps.content: The passage says the Federalist Papers were published in New York newspapers in 1787-88. Both named essays are individual essays in that collection.

steps.title: Avoid unsupported overlaps
steps.content: A is wrong because the authorship of No. 12 is certain. C is unsupported because the passage does not say both essays appeared in the Independent Journal. D is wrong because neither essay is described as collaborative. The shared fact is publication during 1787 or 1788. The answer is B.
